description: A photograph of five wheeled hard-shell suitcases of varying colors lined up against a paneled wall on a tiled floor near a staircase. White text at the top reads 'If you are here illegally, it's time to go home.' and text at the bottom reads 'Self-deport today with the CBP Home app.'
notable_text: If you are here illegally, it's time to go home.; Self-deport today with the CBP Home app.
